hint.en: Hint: Mention that Python is a high-level, interpreted language known for its clear readability and versatility.
hint.hi: संकेत: बताएं कि Python एक हाई-लेवल, इंटरप्रिटेड भाषा है जो अपनी स्पष्ट पठनीयता और बहुमुखी प्रतिभा के लिए जानी जाती है।
hint.gu: સંકેત: સમજાવો કે Python એ એક ઉચ્ચ-સ્તરની, ઇન્ટરપ્રિટેડ ભાષા છે.
hint.hi_en: Hint: Batao ki Python ek high-level, interpreted language hai jo readability aur versatility ke liye jani jati hai.
hint.gu_en: Hint: Kaho ke Python high-level interpreted programming language chhe.

positive_points: Correctly identified Python as high-level and interpreted
suggestions: Mention applications in Data Science and Web Development.
evaluation.improved_answer: Python is a high-level, interpreted, general-purpose programming language. It features dynamic typing, automatic garbage collection, and is designed with readability in mind, supporting multiple programming paradigms including OOP and functional programming.

question.en: What are the main features of Python?
question.hi: Python की मुख्य विशेषताएं क्या हैं?
question.gu: Python ની મુખ્ય વિશેષતાઓ શું છે?
question.hi_en: Python ki main features kya hain?
question.gu_en: Python ni main features shu chhe?

hint.en: Hint: Highlight readability, dynamic typing, automatic memory management, and extensive libraries.
hint.hi: संकेत: पठनीयता, डायनामिक टाइपिंग, ऑटोमैटिक मेमोरी मैनेजमेंट और व्यापक लाइब्रेरी को रेखांकित करें।
hint.gu: સંકેત: સરળતા, ડાયનેમિક ટાઇપિંગ અને મોટી લાઇબ્રેરીઓ વિશે જણાવો.
hint.hi_en: Hint: Readability, dynamic typing, garbage collection aur libraries ke baare me batao.
hint.gu_en: Hint: Features jeva ke dynamic typing, automatic memory management ane libraries na vishe kaho.

positive_points: Mentioned the large ecosystem of libraries
missing_points: Could explain automatic memory management (garbage collection)
suggestions: List features in a structured way.
evaluation.improved_answer: Key features of Python include: 1) Easy-to-read syntax, 2) Interpreted execution, 3) Dynamically typed variables, 4) Automatic garbage collection, and 5) An extensive standard library and ecosystem (like Django, Pandas).

question.en: Explain the Global Interpreter Lock (GIL) in Python and its impact on multi-threading.
question.hi: Python में Global Interpreter Lock (GIL) क्या है और multi-threading पर इसका क्या प्रभाव पड़ता है?
question.gu: Python માં Global Interpreter Lock (GIL) શું છે અને multi-threading પર તેની શું અસર થાય છે?
question.hi_en: Python me Global Interpreter Lock (GIL) kya hai aur multi-threading par iska kya impact padta hai?
question.gu_en: Python ma Global Interpreter Lock (GIL) shu chhe aur multi-threading par eni shu asar thay chhe?

hint.en: Hint: Focus on how GIL is a mutex in CPython that restricts thread execution to one thread at a time, limiting CPU parallelism.
hint.hi: संकेत: ध्यान दें कि GIL CPython में एक म्यूटैक्स है जो एक बार में केवल एक ही थ्रेड को निष्पादित करने की अनुमति देता है।
hint.gu: સંકેત: GIL એ CPython નો મ્યુટેક્સ છે જે એક સમયે એક જ થ્રેડને રન થવા દે છે.
hint.hi_en: Hint: Focus karo ki GIL ek mutex lock hai standard CPython me jo ek time pe ek hi thread run karne deta hai.
hint.gu_en: Hint: GIL na vishe kaho ke e ek time par ek j thread ne execute thava de chhe CPython ma.

positive_points: Correctly identified GIL as a mutex in CPython
missing_points: Could explain how to bypass it (multiprocessing module)
suggestions: Clarify that GIL doesn't impact I/O-bound tasks.
evaluation.improved_answer: The Global Interpreter Lock (GIL) is a mutex lock in the standard CPython implementation that ensures only one thread executes Python bytecode at a time. It prevents parallel execution in CPU-bound multi-threaded programs. To bypass this limit, developers use multiprocessing or alternative Python implementations like Jython.
